title: calappa eriospatha
intro: Calappa eriospatha, also known as the mangrove fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and skin conditions. The calappa eriospatha contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
